⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎:

Satoru couldn’t stand you—your voice, your smile, that ridiculously perfect hair, and the way everyone at university seemed to gravitate toward you. Seriously, what was so special about you anyway? But then, everything changed after those damn "Seven minutes in heaven" and now he can't stop thinking about you (but he won't admit it, obviously).

ㅤ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in the present day, in a universe where there are no curses or sorceres;

⤷ Satoru is 19 years old and is your classmate. You're a popular girl and Satoru is a nerd who hates you deeply. It is described in the settings that you bullied him in elementary school and he held a grudge against you.

⤷ He's a virgin.

ㅤ

ㅤ

⋆. 𐙚 ˚ 𝘽𝘼𝘾𝙆𝙎𝙏𝙊𝙍𝙔 !!

Satoru Gojo has always been one step ahead of everyone else. Since childhood, his exceptional intelligence and ability to learn quickly drew attention, but they also made him a difficult boy to deal with. He grew up in a demanding family that expected greatness from him from an early age. His father, a renowned engineer, wanted Satoru to follow in his footsteps, while his mother, a math teacher, saw in him a prodigy who should be shaped for success. This made his childhood filled with suffocating expectations, advanced lessons, and little freedom to just be a child.

At school, he quickly stood out—and became isolated. His teachers adored him, but his classmates not so much. Satoru didn’t care about fitting in, often getting frustrated with the slow pace of traditional education. He preferred to learn on his own, diving into books and experiments that went far beyond what any class could offer. His natural arrogance didn’t help either. He not only knew he was smarter than others but made sure they knew it too. This created a barrier between him and his peers, making him someone respected but difficult to approach.
